assertions.expectation: Identifies Service A (minAvailable=100%) as a guaranteed upgrade blocker — no disruptions allowed at all
assertions.reason: Response correctly identifies Service A as HIGH RISK and explains it will block ALL rolling upgrades because it requires 100% availability

assertions.expectation: Identifies Service B (maxUnavailable=0) as also blocking upgrades — same effect as 100% minAvailable
assertions.reason: Response correctly identifies Service B as HIGH RISK and explains it will block ALL rolling upgrades because it cannot tolerate any pod being unavailable

assertions.expectation: States Service C (minAvailable=2 with 3 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod disruption at a time
assertions.reason: Response incorrectly categorizes Service C as RISKY rather than safe, stating it has high risk of blocking upgrades, when it actually allows 1 pod disruption

assertions.expectation: States Service D (maxUnavailable=1 with 5 replicas) is safe — allows 1 pod down at a time
assertions.reason: Response correctly identifies Service D as SAFE with low risk, explaining it maintains 80% availability while allowing controlled upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service A: change to minAvailable=N-1 or maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response provides specific fix recommendations including 'maxUnavailable=1' or 'minAvailable=n-1 replicas' and shows YAML examples

assertions.expectation: Recommends fixing Service B: change to maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends changing Service B to 'maxUnavailable=1' and provides YAML example

assertions.expectation: Explains that GKE respects PDBs for up to 1 hour during surge upgrades, then may force-drain
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE-specific behavior about 1-hour PDB respect period or force-draining

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl patch commands to fix the problematic PDBs
assertions.reason: Response provides YAML configuration examples but does not provide actual kubectl patch commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing PDB changes in a non-production environment first
assertions.reason: Response mentions testing PDBs with 'kubectl drain' but does not specifically recommend testing changes in non-production environment first
